summary: Iteration 52 - Welcome Page Refinement Testing Complete. All features verified: Hero carousel with 4 slides (auto-advance 6s, dots, arrows), streamlined content sections (Value blocks, Before/After, Chi siamo, Audience), collaboration form with client-side toast, lighter footer (bg-app), and Founder role rename in Control Room and Profile page.

details.navigation_arrows: ✓ Prev/Next arrows found with data-testid='carousel-prev' and 'carousel-next'
details.dots_navigation: ✓ 4 carousel dots found with data-testid='carousel-dot-0' through 'carousel-dot-3'
details.auto_advance: ✓ Auto-advance configured at 6 seconds (pauses on hover)

details.italian: ✓ 'La burocrazia fiscale non dovrebbe essere un labirinto incomprensibile' found
details.english: ✓ 'Tax bureaucracy shouldn't be an incomprehensible maze' found after language switch

details.block_titles_it: ✓ Comprensione, Guida operativa, Preparazione sicura, Autonomia crescente
details.block_titles_en: ✓ Understanding, Operational guidance, Secure preparation, Growing autonomy

details.labels_it: ✓ 'Prima di Herion' and 'Dopo Herion' labels found
details.labels_en: ✓ 'Before Herion' and 'After Herion' labels found after switch

details.section_found: ✓ About section (Chi siamo) found with data-testid='about-section'
details.principle_quote: ✓ Herion principle quote 'Impara a essere contabile di te stesso' found

details.title_en: ✓ 'Who is Herion for' title found after switch
details.cards: ✓ 3 audience cards found: Professionisti, Aziende, Privati

details.title_en: ✓ 'Want to help us grow?' title found after switch
details.toast_confirmation: ✓ Success toast 'Grazie! Ti contatteremo presto.' appeared after submission

collaboration_form.note: MOCKED - Collaboration form is client-side only (toast confirmation, no backend endpoint)

details.light_background: ✓ Footer uses bg-[var(--bg-app)] with border-t (light styling, not dark)

details.text_it: ✓ 'Meno confusione. Piu controllo.' CTA text found
details.text_en: ✓ 'Less confusion. More control.' CTA text found after switch

details.switch_to_english: ✓ All content switches to English correctly
details.switch_back_to_italian: ✓ Content switches back to Italian correctly

details.carousel_visible: ✓ Carousel visible and functional on mobile

details.page_loaded: ✓ Control Room page loaded at /creator route
details.footer_text: ✓ 'Area riservata al Founder' footer text visible

details.founder_role: ✓ 'Founder' role label displayed for creator role user

mocked_apis.collaboration_form: Client-side only - shows toast confirmation but doesn't send data to backend (future feature)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified all welcome page refinement features. Hero carousel uses HeroCarousel component with 4 slides from /public/carousel-1.png through carousel-4.png, 6s auto-advance, opacity transitions. Collaboration form is MOCKED (client-side toast only). Footer uses bg-[var(--bg-app)] with border-t for light styling. Control Room route is /creator (not /control-room). Founder badge and footer text verified. Profile page shows 'Founder' for creator role. All data-testids working: hero-carousel, carousel-prev, carousel-next, carousel-dot-0-3, value-section, before-after-section, about-section, audience-section, collab-section, collab-name, collab-email, collab-message, collab-submit, cta-section, footer, creator-control-room, profile-settings-page.
